stonetop.summary: Armored riders of the southern legions, striking where the foe is weak.

system.concept: Armored riders of the southern legions, striking where the foe is weak.
system.description: The armies of the south are said to be as countless as the leaves in the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6kt1b8ozEREDCi4k]{Great Wood}. Their heavy horse circle and harry, then form a wedge and charge home. Thankfully, the southern nations have so far seen no value in invading the north. At least, not yet.
